description:
Set in the future on the Yellow River Planet, the realm of car racing has advanced into the domain of the Galaxy Racers Riders steer their simulator-racers which remotely control the actual customized speedsters hurtling around a track.

The hero, a teenager named Roy, was born to race and aspires to be the king of Galaxy Racers. But his guardian, his grandfather, sees a threat from and great danger in the evil and greedy Taz, the CEO of the Titan Space Navigation Auto Group which seeks to swallow or destroy all competitors, and whose Mosha Racing Team would just as ruthlessly run over and crush Roy under its thundering wheels. Roy's grandfather arranges for him to join the good guys in the Matela Racing Team to race for the highest honors.

In a series of hair-raising and nail-biting races with thrills and spills, growling engines, screeching wheels, burning rubber, smashing metal, intense bitter rivaly, persevering friendships and loyalties forged in grueling teamwork and battle, Ray and Team Matela must conquer their fears and overcome the arrogant and powerful Team Mosha.

(Source: CHINAnimax Youtube Channel)
